operating_model.label: Sports Agency Layer
operating_model.description: Event activation, sponsor representation, athlete and creator relations, and city-level operations. The commercial and production engine modeled on global sports agency standards.

operating_model.label: Broadcast / TTN Layer
operating_model.description: TROPTIONS Television Network provides the owned media and broadcast distribution layer for matchday content, sponsor segments, and fan programming.

operating_model.label: Fan Experience Layer
operating_model.description: QR claim flows, digital moment drops, matchday offers, restaurant rewards, and the mobile-first fan engagement system for stadium cities.

operating_model.label: Sponsor + Merchant Layer
operating_model.description: Corporate sponsor activation packages, local merchant onboarding, offer management, proof reporting, and campaign analytics for every event window.

operating_model.label: Solana Launch Layer
operating_model.description: SPL token launcher, digital moment minting, fan badge issuance, wallet-free claim flows, and Solana Mobile integration for stadium-scale activations.

operating_model.label: Infrastructure + Proof Layer
operating_model.description: UNYKORN/FTH routing, Cloudflare delivery, x402 payment rails, public proof dashboards, and system health monitoring during live event windows.

groups.label: Leadership Team
groups.description: The core strategy and operating leadership of TROPTIONS Sports Network.

roles.title: Founder / Systems Architect
roles.responsibility: Owns vision, infrastructure, Solana launcher, UNYKORN/FTH rails, and the funding narrative. Sets direction across all four platform pillars.
roles.importance: The integrating force across sports agency, broadcast, event commerce, and infrastructure layers.

roles.title: Head of Sports Network
roles.responsibility: Owns the sports network product, event strategy, fan experience design, and site direction. Primary face of the network to external partners.
roles.importance: Drives event activation quality, fan product depth, and the credibility of the network with sponsors and media.

roles.title: Head of Partnerships
roles.responsibility: Owns sponsor deals, agency relations, local business programs, restaurant and hotel networks, charity campaigns, and event operator agreements.
roles.importance: Revenue depends on sponsors, venue partners, and corporate activations signing and renewing at scale.

roles.title: Head of Media / TTN Broadcast
roles.responsibility: Owns TROPTIONS Television Network, the content schedule, matchday programming, sponsor integration segments, interviews, and short-form distribution.
roles.importance: The broadcast layer is the public face of the network and the primary vehicle for sponsor activation and fan reach.

roles.title: Head of Product
roles.responsibility: Owns the full platform experience: fan flows, partner dashboards, moments and claims, proof reporting, wallet flows, and admin tools.
roles.importance: Product polish determines conversion from fan interest to merchant revenue to sponsor renewals.

roles.title: Head of Grants + Funding
roles.responsibility: Owns Solana Foundation, Colosseum, Superteam, Solana Mobile, infrastructure credits, and institutional sponsor funding relationships.
roles.importance: Infrastructure grants and ecosystem funding are material non-dilutive capital at early stage. Requires dedicated focus.

groups.label: Event Operations
groups.description: The on-the-ground team that runs city activations, fan engagement, and sponsor execution at each event.

roles.title: Event Director
roles.responsibility: Plans and executes each city event activation end-to-end: venue logistics, merchant setup, QR deployment, on-site coordination, and post-event reporting.
roles.importance: Event quality is the proof-of-concept. One well-run activation converts sponsor skeptics into buyers and media coverage into credibility.

roles.title: Fan Experience Lead
roles.responsibility: Owns fan rewards design, claim flows, moment drop timing, digital badge logic, and the mobile experience for stadium and watch-party attendees.
roles.importance: Fan engagement drives claim volume, which drives the sponsor proof data and merchant traffic metrics that justify renewal spend.

roles.title: Sponsor Activation Lead
roles.responsibility: Converts sponsor agreements into live campaigns: logo placement, TTN mentions, digital rewards, offer packages, and post-event proof reports.
roles.importance: Sponsor activation quality determines renewals and referrals. One sponsor served well becomes three the following season.

roles.title: Merchant Network Lead
roles.responsibility: Onboards and manages restaurants, hotels, rideshare operators, venues, and local offer partners for each event city market.
roles.importance: Merchant density is the core of the fan value proposition. Without local offers, digital moments have no commercial anchor.

roles.title: Charity + Community Lead
roles.responsibility: Owns nonprofit partnerships, local youth sports campaigns, donation drives, community events, and the public proof reports for impact claims.
roles.importance: Community proof is a major differentiator for sponsor trust, press coverage, and public benefit positioning.

roles.title: Athlete / Creator Relations Lead
roles.responsibility: Sources athletes, creators, broadcast hosts, local soccer voices, and influencers to amplify event activations and TTN content reach.
roles.importance: Talent relationships unlock earned media, authentic fan content, and creator-driven claim distribution that paid media cannot replicate.

groups.label: Media Team
groups.description: The production and content operation behind TROPTIONS Television Network and sports programming.

roles.title: Executive Producer
roles.responsibility: Owns all TTN Sports programming: show formats, segment structure, content calendar, sponsor integration points, and overall production standards.
roles.importance: Broadcast quality determines whether advertisers, athletes, and media partners take the network seriously enough to commit.

roles.title: Host / Anchor
roles.responsibility: The front-facing on-air personality for TROPTIONS Sports Network programming, matchday shows, branded content, and sponsor features.
roles.importance: A credible, camera-ready anchor makes the network feel real and attracts talent relationships, sponsor investment, and viewership.

roles.title: Soccer Analyst
roles.responsibility: Provides expert match breakdowns, player and team analysis, global storylines, and fan programming commentary across tournament coverage.
roles.importance: Analytical depth separates a real sports media brand from event marketing. Credibility is built through knowledge, not production value alone.

roles.title: Field Producer
roles.responsibility: Captures on-location content: fan activations, restaurant partnerships, charity events, merchant profiles, and city-level human stories.
roles.importance: Field footage is the proof content that makes sponsor reports real and social clips authentic for fan audiences.

roles.title: Video Editor
roles.responsibility: Cuts highlights, sponsor reels, social media clips, event recaps, and promotional packages to broadcast-grade standard.
roles.importance: Edited content is the deliverable sponsors are purchasing and the content fans are sharing. Quality is the metric.

roles.title: Social Media Producer
roles.responsibility: Publishes daily matchday clips, fan polls, behind-the-scenes content, and sponsor activations across all distribution platforms.
roles.importance: Social reach is the distribution layer that drives fan discovery, moment claim volume, and sponsor audience reach data.

groups.label: Technology Team
groups.description: The engineering and design team building the TROPTIONS Sports Network platform and Solana infrastructure.

roles.title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer
roles.responsibility: Owns the TROPTIONS Sports Network Next.js application: all pages, APIs, data pipelines, partner dashboards, and deployment infrastructure.
roles.importance: Platform stability and feature velocity are the foundation of every other team function during live event windows.

roles.title: Solana Engineer
roles.responsibility: Owns the SPL token launcher, wallet signing, metadata management, token authority controls, mint flows, and claim verification on-chain.
roles.importance: The Solana layer is the infrastructure beneath digital moments, fan rewards, and the token economy that sponsors are purchasing reach into.

roles.title: Infrastructure Engineer
roles.responsibility: Owns Cloudflare tunnel routing, PM2 process management, domain configuration, public uptime monitoring, and system health during event windows.
roles.importance: All sites and APIs depend on infrastructure reliability. Event traffic spikes are predictable and require deliberate preparation.

roles.title: UX/UI Designer
roles.responsibility: Makes the platform feel premium: broadcast-grade sports polish, agency-quality presentation, and TROPTIONS brand consistency across all surfaces.
roles.importance: Visual credibility is the first impression for sponsors, media partners, and venue operators evaluating the network.

roles.title: Data / Analytics Engineer
roles.responsibility: Tracks and reports on claim volume, sponsor click-through, merchant redemptions, proof dashboard accuracy, and event KPIs in real time.
roles.importance: Sponsor renewals are driven by data. Proof without clean, auditable data is an assertion, not an asset.

roles.title: Security / Compliance Advisor
roles.responsibility: Reviews token disclosures, risk language, privacy policies, no-investment disclaimers, and ensures no false affiliation or endorsement claims.
roles.importance: One compliance failure in language or presentation eliminates institutional partnerships before they begin.

groups.label: Advisory Board
groups.description: Domain experts advising on sports agency standards, soccer media, Solana ecosystem, and enterprise sponsor sales.

roles.title: Sports Agency Advisor
roles.responsibility: Advises on agency model structure, talent representation standards, sponsor deal terms, event activation protocols, and media rights awareness.
roles.importance: Sports agency credibility is built through relationships. The right advisor opens the right rooms.

roles.title: Soccer Media Advisor
roles.responsibility: Advises on soccer content depth, fan programming formats, broadcast rights awareness, and commentary quality standards for global tournament coverage.
roles.importance: Soccer-specific media knowledge is distinct from general sports broadcasting. Domain expertise is the difference between credible and imitative.

roles.title: Solana Ecosystem Advisor
roles.responsibility: Advises on Solana Foundation relationships, grant program applications, token mechanics review, Colosseum submissions, and ecosystem partnership positioning.
roles.importance: The Solana grant pipeline is material non-dilutive capital. The right advisor accelerates access and de-risks application quality.

roles.title: Sponsor Sales Advisor
roles.responsibility: Advises on corporate sponsorship deal structure, activation packaging, proof reporting standards, pricing, and enterprise sales cycle management.
roles.importance: Enterprise sponsors operate on long cycles. An experienced advisor shortens the timeline and frames the pitch in the language buyers respond to.

roles.title: Event Safety / Compliance Advisor
roles.responsibility: Advises on event permitting, public safety compliance, venue liability structure, and operational risk management for large-scale activations.
roles.importance: Event-scale activations carry operational risk. Compliance gaps at the event level become company-level liability.

roles.title: Charity / Community Advisor
roles.responsibility: Advises on nonprofit partnership structure, charity campaign proof standards, community trust-building, and impact reporting integrity.
roles.importance: Community proof is only credible when partnerships and claims are independently verifiable and structured correctly from the start.
